codeSystems.name: ZimProvinceCS
codeSystems.title: Zimbabwe Province Code System
codeSystems.description: The ten provinces of Zimbabwe. The 'facilityCode' property gives the two-digit province number (01-10) used as the province segment of a national facility code. Concept codes are also aligned with ISO 3166-2:ZW subdivisions (e.g. HA = ZW-HA).

codeSystems.name: CSZWLabTests
codeSystems.title: ZW Laboratory Tests
codeSystems.description: National code list for laboratory tests ordered in Zimbabwe (ZW.LAB.A.DE17).

codeSystems.name: CSZWLaboratories
codeSystems.title: ZW National Laboratory List
codeSystems.description: National identifiers for public-health laboratories in Zimbabwe.

codeSystems.name: CSZWReasonForTest
codeSystems.title: ZW Reason for Test
codeSystems.description: Coded reasons for laboratory test requests in Zimbabwe (ZW.LAB.A.DE30).

codeSystems.name: CSZWRejectionReasons

codeSystems.description: Reasons a specimen was rejected by the laboratory (ZW.LAB.A.DE88).

codeSystems.name: CSZWReportReviewState
codeSystems.title: ZW Report Review State
codeSystems.description: LIMS workflow/review state for a laboratory report (ZW.LAB.A.DE73).

codeSystems.name: CSZWSampleTypes
codeSystems.title: ZW Specimen Types
codeSystems.description: National code list for specimen/sample types collected in Zimbabwe (ZW.LAB.A.DE53).

codeSystems.name: v3.MaritalStatus
codeSystems.title: v3 Code System MaritalStatus
codeSystems.description:
* * * No description supplied * * *  Open Issue:
The specific meanings of these codes can vary somewhat by jurisdiction and implementation so caution should be used when determining equivalency.

codeSystems.name: v3.ObservationInterpretation
codeSystems.title: v3 Code System ObservationInterpretation
codeSystems.description: One or more codes providing a rough qualitative interpretation of the observation, such as "normal" / "abnormal", "low" / "high", "better" / "worse", "resistant" /  "susceptible", "expected" / "not expected". The value set is intended to be for ANY use where coded representation of an interpretation is needed.

codeSystems.name: v3.RoleCode
codeSystems.title: v3 Code System RoleCode
codeSystems.description: A set of codes further specifying the kind of Role; specific classification codes for further qualifying RoleClass codes.
